scripts.build: node scripts/copy-fonts.mjs && node scripts/encode-hero.mjs && node scripts/auto-internal-links.mjs && node scripts/check-image-refs.mjs && node scripts/check-meta.mjs --strict && npm test && node scripts/generate-og.mjs && node scripts/generate-llms-full.mjs && node scripts/generate-agent-skills-index.mjs && astro build && npm run verify:postbuild
scripts.verify:postbuild: node scripts/check-internal-links.mjs && vitest run tests/api-dist.test.ts tests/webmcp-html.test.ts tests/redirects.test.ts tests/sitemap-rss.test.ts tests/blog-md-sibling.test.ts
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=ccme-ma-v3 --branch preview
